title: BIG4 Adventure Whitsunday Resort
description: Tropical resort with bright cabins and condos, plus an outdoor lagoon-style pool and mini-golf.
address: 25/29 Shute Harbour Rd, Airlie Beach QLD 4802, Australia
hotelDescription:
Set on 10 hectares of gardens, this modern resort is 5 km from the Airlie Beach Lagoon and 6 km from the Whitsunday Sailing Club.
 Bright studio cabins with private verandas offer kitchens, free Wi-Fi, cable TV and bunk beds. Upgraded cabins have flat-screen TVs, and cabins with 1 or 2 bedrooms add separate living spaces. There are also 3-bedroom condos with iPod docks, washers/dryers and private BBQs.
 Amenities include an outdoor lagoon-style pool with waterslides and poolside massages (fee), plus a tennis court, mini-golf and an adventure playground. There's also a kids' club and outdoor movies. Campsites and caravan sites are available.
